channel.title: Audio Plugin Guy - Deals Feed
channel.description: Las mejores ofertas de Audio Plugin Guy.

item.title: [SAVE BIG] Gooey Audio|Gooey re-releases Shimmer. A free upgrade for licensed users. On sale for $4.99, reg. $24.99
[FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] ZAK Sound|ZAK Sound’s Raizes Player for Win, Mac & Linux is now available as a free download (previously, only available when purchasing a Raizes Instrument).?NEW
item.description: Descuento: 100% - Desarrollador: ZAK Sound - Finaliza: None

item.title: [HOT] Baby Audio|Baby Audio Deal of the Month – 70% off on Spaced Out echo effect plugin for Mac & Win. Newsletter subscribers take an additional 10% off with the code: BAFAM25
[HOT] Acustica Audio|Acustica Audio has released Ruby 3 tube equalizer plugin for Mac & Win. The intro is 41% off

[SAVE BIG] HoRNet Plugins|HoRNet Plugins Spring Sale – up to 80% off on all plugins and bundles (except the recently released VHS MK2). Use the code: SPRING8026
[FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] Wide Blue Sound|Wide Blue Sound has released Tracer oscilloscope plugin for Win & Mac
item.description: Descuento: 100% - Desarrollador: Wide Blue Sound - Finaliza: Unknown
